title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
